title: [cross-impl] duty_cycle algorithm removed from Zephyr
description: Commit fc8b0114a deleted lichen/lib/hal/hal.c containing duty_cycle_* functions with circular buffer + overlap calc for tx window. Rust lora-phy or mesh-gateway retains equivalent logic. Python reference vectors assume specific behavior. Results in divergent transmit scheduling behavior across impls for same regulatory algorithm. No replacement found in lichen/lib.
